title: story(task): scaffold cloud/firestore-tenants module (schema)
body:
Provision Firestore database + tenants/share-grants/share-audit collections with indexes and IAM. Establishes the schema substrate for tenant-registry and share-service.

Component: components/firestore-tenants.md
ADRs: ADR-0001, ADR-0003
TRs: TR-01, TR-04, TR-05, TR-07

Dependencies: none (foundational).
Unblocks: tenant-registry endpoints, share-service endpoints.

Per-task plan: see outputs/response.md § Schema task per-task plan.

title: story(task): scaffold cloud/media-bucket module
body:
Provision multi-region GCS bucket, versioning, lifecycle rule, IAM for photo-store-sa (rw) and share-service-sa (signed-URL).

Component: components/media-bucket.md
ADR: ADR-0002
TRs: TR-01, TR-02

Dependencies: none.
Unblocks: photo-store, share-service signed URLs.

title: story(task): scaffold services/tenant-registry skeleton (main, app, ConfigFromEnv)
body:
Mirror services/machine layout: main.go, app/app.go (ConfigFromEnv + Main), empty endpoint/ and service/ packages, TLS server bound to HTTP_PORT.

Component: components/tenant-registry.md
ADR: ADR-0001
TRs: TR-04, TR-05

Dependencies: none (boots independently of firestore module presence; wiring stub).
Unblocks: tenant CRUD endpoints.

title: story(task): tenant-registry Firestore client + endpoint interface
body:
service/tenants_client.go wrapping firestore.Client for the tenants collection. Define TenantStore interface in endpoint/ (1–3 methods). Unit tests with a fake.

Component: components/tenant-registry.md
Dependencies: tenant-registry skeleton, firestore-tenants module (for collection name contract).

title: story(task): tenant-registry POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE/LIST /api/v1/tenants
body:
Implement five endpoints with protobuf request/response types under endpoint/endpointpb/. Use pkg/errorpb for ValidationError/ConflictError. Soft-delete sets state=evicted.

Component: components/tenant-registry.md
TRs: TR-04, TR-05.
Dependencies: tenant-registry Firestore client task.

title: story(task): scaffold services/photo-store skeleton (main, app, ConfigFromEnv)
body:
Same shape as tenant-registry skeleton.

Component: components/photo-store.md
Dependencies: none.
Unblocks: media endpoints.

title: story(task): photo-store GCS client + tenant validator interface
body:
service/object_client.go (cloud.google.com/go/storage). endpoint/TenantValidator interface that calls tenant-registry over HTTP. Unit tests with fakes.

Component: components/photo-store.md
Dependencies: photo-store skeleton, tenant-registry endpoints (for contract; can stub for tests).

title: story(task): photo-store /api/v1/media upload/get/delete/list
body:
Multipart upload, ULID object naming `{tenant_id}/{ulid}.{ext}`, prefix isolation enforced server-side. Caller-auth (owner OR share-grant-bearing) check on GET.

Component: components/photo-store.md
TRs: TR-01.
Dependencies: photo-store GCS client task, share-service grant verification (for GET only — stub for first cut).

title: story(task): scaffold services/share-service skeleton (main, app, ConfigFromEnv)
body:
Same shape as tenant-registry skeleton.

Component: components/share-service.md
Dependencies: none.

title: story(task): share-service Firestore clients (grants + append-only audit)
body:
service/grants_client.go and service/audit_client.go. Audit writes only — no Update/Delete methods. Endpoint-package interfaces (GrantStore, AuditLogger).

Component: components/share-service.md
Dependencies: share-service skeleton, firestore-tenants module.

title: story(task): share-service mint/fetch/revoke/list + signed-URL endpoint
body:
POST/GET/DELETE /api/v1/shares, GET /api/v1/shares/{id}/url. Each state-changing path appends a `share-audit` event. Signed URL TTL from config.

Component: components/share-service.md
TRs: TR-03, TR-06, TR-07.
Dependencies: share-service Firestore clients task, media-bucket module (for signing IAM).

title: story(task): wire three Cloud Run services into deployment Terraform
body:
Service accounts (tenant-registry-sa, photo-store-sa, share-service-sa), Cloud Run service blocks, NEGs named `{service}-{region}-neg`, backend services on the existing HTTPS LB. Health checks on HTTP_PORT.

Dependencies: all three service implementations + both modules.

title: story(task): integration test — tenant onboard → upload → share → retrieve
body:
End-to-end test against Firestore + GCS emulators (or a sandbox project) covering TR-01, TR-03, TR-06, TR-07.

Dependencies: all service-implementation tasks.
